name: Generate newsletters with Google Drive and WordPress automatically for Content SEO

options.systemMessage: You are the coordinator for a content seo pipeline. Break the request into sub-tasks, delegate each to the matching specialist tool, then merge results into one coherent answer. Never call the same specialist twice for one request.

parameters.description: Delegate research sub-tasks for a page to the Research specialist workflow.
Delegate draft sub-tasks for a page to the Draft specialist workflow.
Delegate review sub-tasks for a page to the Review specialist workflow.

parameters.content:
### Hourly Schedule

Starts the workflow on a timer — every 2 h. No input data; downstream nodes fetch what they need.

Next: Frame the Assignment

### Frame the Assignment

Shapes the item: writes `assignment`, `deadline`. Keeps the schema explicit between stages.

Next: Coordinator Agent

### Coordinator Agent

The AI brain: reads the input, decides which attached tools to call (and in what order), then composes the answer.

Next: Unpack Sections

### Anthropic Chat Model

Chat model powering the AI step (model: `claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929`). Swap providers here without rewiring.

Feeds **Coordinator Agent** as `languageModel`

🔑 Anthropic API key

### Research Specialist (Sub-workflow)

Specialist sub-workflow exposed as a callable tool — one narrow capability per tool.

Feeds **Coordinator Agent** as `tool`

### Draft Specialist (Sub-workflow)

Specialist sub-workflow exposed as a callable tool — one narrow capability per tool.

Feeds **Coordinator Agent** as `tool`

### Review Specialist (Sub-workflow)

Specialist sub-workflow exposed as a callable tool — one narrow capability per tool.

Feeds **Coordinator Agent** as `tool`

### Enforce Result Schema

Forces the agent's answer into the JSON schema below — downstream nodes rely on this exact shape.

Feeds **Coordinator Agent** as `outputParser`

### Unpack Sections

Explodes the `output.sections` array into one item per element.

Next: Persist Deliverable to Google Sheets

### Persist Deliverable to Google Sheets

googleSheets — `append` operation against the connected account.

↻ retries 3×/2s · 🔑 Google OAuth2 / service account

nodes.name: Note: Persist Deliverable to Google Sheets

parameters.content:
# Generate newsletters with Google Drive and WordPress automatically for Content SEO

**Pattern:** Content Generation · **Level:** Foundation · **Trigger:** Scheduled

## What it does
Generate newsletters with Google Drive and WordPress automatically for Content SEO. It runs automatically on a schedule.

## Why it exists
Manual content seo is slow and error-prone; this workflow makes the process repeatable, monitored and hands-off, with failures surfaced instead of silently lost.

## Main flow
Hourly Schedule → Frame the Assignment → Coordinator Agent → Unpack Sections → Persist Deliverable to Google Sheets

## Use it for
- Teams that want to content generation without manual effort
- Anyone automating content seo in marketing
- Replacing a fragile manual process with a reliable workflow

## You get
- Improves response time
- Responds in seconds
- Standardizes the process every time

## Before first run
Connect credentials: Anthropic API key; Google OAuth2 / service account.
Follow the color key: 🟦 entry · 🟪 AI · 🟫 actions · ⬜ utilities · 🟩 outputs · 🟥 error rail.
Each node has its own doc card underneath — read those before editing.

## 🤖 AI cluster

Purple nodes form one AI unit: the root node orchestrates, sub-nodes plug in via typed ports (model / memory / tools / parser). Swap the chat model without rewiring anything else. Costs scale with tokens — keep prompts lean and cap iterations.

## 🛠 Customize me

Quick wins: point the data nodes at your own accounts (see 🔑 lines on each card), adjust the trigger cadence, and tune thresholds/labels to your content seo process. Every node card explains its role — safe to extend at any marked branch.
